designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style

The brand personality for this design system is rooted in the intersection of traditional grooming rituals and modern architectural precision. It targets a discerning clientele in Albuquerque who value heritage but demand contemporary excellence. The emotional response should be one of immediate composure—a "sanctuary of style" that feels both exclusive and grounded.

The design style is **Editorial Minimalism** with **Industrial accents**. It leverages the high-contrast drama of luxury fashion journals while maintaining the structural integrity of high-end interior design. Key characteristics include:
- **Spatial Luxury:** Massive margins and intentional negative space to allow the high-end imagery and typography to breathe.
- **Architectural Lines:** Thin, 1px copper rules used to define sections, mimicking the precision of a barber's blade and industrial metalwork.
- **Atmospheric Depth:** A "Dark Mode first" approach that utilizes deep charcoal layers to create a sense of evening-hour sophistication.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout philosophy follows a **Fixed Grid** model with an emphasis on **Sectional Breathing Room**.

- **Grid:** A 12-column grid on desktop with generous 32px gutters. Content should often be offset (e.g., spanning 8 columns and centered) to create an asymmetrical, editorial feel.
- **Vertical Rhythm:** Large vertical gaps (`section-gap`) of 128px or more between major content blocks to emphasize exclusivity.
- **Mobile Adaption:** On mobile, margins reduce to 24px, and typography scales down aggressively. The layout should collapse into a single-column flow, maintaining the high-contrast color blocks to differentiate sections.

## Elevation & Depth

To maintain the "Industrial" and "Editorial" feel, this design system avoids soft, fuzzy shadows in favor of **Tonal Layering** and **Sharp Lines**.

- **Surface Levels:** Depth is created by shifting background colors. The base is Obsidian (#121212). Elements "closer" to the user use slightly lighter charcoal (#1A1A1A).
- **Outlines:** Use 1px solid borders in Copper (#B87333) or subtle Grey (#2A2A2A) to define containers. Do not use rounded corners for elevated cards; keep them sharp to reflect the industrial theme.
- **Backdrop Blurs:** When overlays (modals or menus) are used, apply a heavy background blur (20px) over the Obsidian base to create a "Smoked Glass" effect.

## Components

- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid Copper (#B87333) with black text, strictly rectangular. Secondary buttons are "Ghost" style: 1px Copper border with Off-White text.
- **Input Fields:** Bottom-border only. A single 1px Copper line under the text input, with the label in `label-caps` floating above. No background fill.
- **Cards:** No shadows. Cards are defined by a background color of #1A1A1A and a subtle 1px border. 
- **Chips/Tags:** Small, rectangular boxes with `label-caps` typography. High contrast (Off-white on Obsidian).
- **Service List:** Use a "Menu" style layout—item name in Playfair Display on the left, price on the right, connected by a subtle dotted line or simple negative space.
- **Call to Action:** Oversized typography paired with a single, high-impact image of the shop's interior or a close-up of a grooming tool.

  container-max: 1280px
  gutter: 32px
  margin-desktop: 64px
  margin-mobile: 24px
  section-gap: 128px
---

## Brand & Style

The brand personality for this design system is rooted in the intersection of traditional grooming rituals and modern architectural precision. It targets a discerning clientele in Albuquerque who value heritage but demand contemporary excellence. The emotional response should be one of immediate composure—a "sanctuary of style" that feels both exclusive and grounded.

The design style is **Editorial Minimalism** with **Industrial accents**. It leverages the high-contrast drama of luxury fashion journals while maintaining the structural integrity of high-end interior design. Key characteristics include:
- **Spatial Luxury:** Massive margins and intentional negative space to allow the high-end imagery and typography to breathe.
- **Architectural Lines:** Thin, 1px copper rules used to define sections, mimicking the precision of a barber's blade and industrial metalwork.
- **Atmospheric Depth:** A "Dark Mode first" approach that utilizes deep charcoal layers to create a sense of evening-hour sophistication.

## Colors

The palette is centered on the "Obsidian & Copper" narrative, emphasizing high-contrast luxury.

- **Obsidian (#121212):** The foundation. It is used for the primary background to evoke the feeling of a dimly lit, high-end lounge.
- **Copper (#B87333):** The signature accent. Used sparingly for calls to action, highlights, and structural lines to suggest quality and craftsmanship.
- **Off-White (#F5F5F7):** The primary text color and secondary background element. Its textured, cool tone prevents the design from feeling too "heavy" or monochromatic.
- **Surface Tiers:** Use #1A1A1A for elevated cards and #2A2A2A for hover states or subtle UI borders to maintain depth without breaking the dark aesthetic.

## Typography

This design system uses a high-contrast typographic pairing to reinforce the "Gentleman's Club" aesthetic.

- **Playfair Display:** Reserved for headlines and oversized display elements. It should be used to establish hierarchy and tone. In "Display" sizes, it should use tight tracking for a modern, editorial feel.
- **Montserrat:** Used for all functional text. To achieve the "Sophisticated Industrial" look, body text should utilize slightly increased tracking (letter spacing) for maximum legibility and a premium, airy feel.
- **Navigation & Labels:** Always use Uppercase Montserrat with wide tracking (`0.2em`) to mimic architectural signage and high-end branding.

## Layout & Spacing

The layout philosophy follows a **Fixed Grid** model with an emphasis on **Sectional Breathing Room**.

- **Grid:** A 12-column grid on desktop with generous 32px gutters. Content should often be offset (e.g., spanning 8 columns and centered) to create an asymmetrical, editorial feel.
- **Vertical Rhythm:** Large vertical gaps (`section-gap`) of 128px or more between major content blocks to emphasize exclusivity.
- **Mobile Adaption:** On mobile, margins reduce to 24px, and typography scales down aggressively. The layout should collapse into a single-column flow, maintaining the high-contrast color blocks to differentiate sections.

## Elevation & Depth

To maintain the "Industrial" and "Editorial" feel, this design system avoids soft, fuzzy shadows in favor of **Tonal Layering** and **Sharp Lines**.

- **Surface Levels:** Depth is created by shifting background colors. The base is Obsidian (#121212). Elements "closer" to the user use slightly lighter charcoal (#1A1A1A).
- **Outlines:** Use 1px solid borders in Copper (#B87333) or subtle Grey (#2A2A2A) to define containers. Do not use rounded corners for elevated cards; keep them sharp to reflect the industrial theme.
- **Backdrop Blurs:** When overlays (modals or menus) are used, apply a heavy background blur (20px) over the Obsidian base to create a "Smoked Glass" effect.

## Shapes

The shape language is **Strictly Geometric**. 

- **Hard Edges:** All buttons, cards, and input fields must have a 0px border radius. This conveys strength, precision, and the industrial nature of the "Barber Lounge" identity.
- **Visual Motif:** Use vertical and horizontal 1px copper lines as dividers. These lines should often extend beyond the content container to the edge of the viewport to create a sense of architectural structure.

## Components

- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid Copper (#B87333) with black text, strictly rectangular. Secondary buttons are "Ghost" style: 1px Copper border with Off-White text.
- **Input Fields:** Bottom-border only. A single 1px Copper line under the text input, with the label in `label-caps` floating above. No background fill.
- **Cards:** No shadows. Cards are defined by a background color of #1A1A1A and a subtle 1px border. 
- **Chips/Tags:** Small, rectangular boxes with `label-caps` typography. High contrast (Off-white on Obsidian).
- **Service List:** Use a "Menu" style layout—item name in Playfair Display on the left, price on the right, connected by a subtle dotted line or simple negative space.
- **Call to Action:** Oversized typography paired with a single, high-impact image of the shop's interior or a close-up of a grooming tool.

screens.name: projects/13260047701136986869/screens/b4f8a348a56e4f248516fd90e29ad1be
screens.prompt:
Create a complete, high-fidelity DESKTOP landing page for T's Barber Lounge based on the established "Obsidian & Copper Industrial Editorial" design system. Layout Requirements: 1. Header: Use TopNavBar component {{DATA:COMPONENTS:COMPONENTS_4}}. Include the phone number (505) 362-7333 and the copper logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}}. 2. Hero: Cinematic, full-bleed section using {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}}. Headline: "ARCHITECTURAL PRECISION IN GROOMING". Subheadline: "Albuquerque's destination for the modern gentleman." Primary CTA: "SECURE YOUR SESSION". 3. #credibility: "The Philosophy" section. Crafting the Standard of Excellence. Use high-contrast serif typography. Include {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}} (barber tools) as an editorial accent. 4. Services/Offerings: "Precision Offerings". Display 'The Cut' ($45), 'The Shave' ($40), and 'The Ritual' ($80) with distinct typographic hierarchy and minimalist icons. 5. About: "T's Story". Establish local credibility in ABQ. Mention the synthesis of tradition and structural perfection. 6. #visit: "Located in the Heart of ABQ". Include address: 7520 Montgomery Boulevard Northeast, Albuquerque, NM 87109. MUST include the specific map slot:
. 7. Contact: "Get In Touch". Minimalist form with validation UI. Email: abqbarberlounge@gmail.com. 8. Footer: Use Footer component {{DATA:COMPONENTS:COMPONENTS_4}}. Style: Moody, upscale, dark theme. Use 'Obsidian' surfaces and 'Copper' accents. Heavy focus on whitespace (obsidian space) and oversized Playfair Display typography. Smooth scrolling and production-ready HTML/CSS. No placeholder images for the map. Use real assets: logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}}, interior {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}}, tools {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}}.

screens.title: T's Barber Lounge | Bespoke Grooming Landing Page

outputComponents.text:
I have completed the full desktop landing page for **T's Barber Lounge**. 

### Architectural Design Implementation:
*   **"Gentleman’s Industrial" Aesthetic:** The site utilizes the **Obsidian and Copper** design system to create a moody, premium environment. I've used oversized **Playfair Display** typography to give the site an editorial, high-fashion journal feel.
*   **Cinematic Storytelling:** The full-bleed hero uses your cinematic shop interior shot, immediately establishing a sense of place and quality.
*   **The Ritual of Services:** Instead of a standard grid, the "Precision Offerings" section uses clean lines and vertical hierarchy to elevate 'The Cut', 'The Shave', and 'The Ritual' into artisanal experiences.
*   **Functional Infrastructure:** I've integrated the precise map slot required for the Albuquerque location and a minimalist contact form with built-in validation states.
*   **Brand Cohesion:** The custom copper logo mark is featured prominently in the navigation, ensuring brand recognition is consistent with the industrial-luxury theme.

The code is fully responsive and optimized for smooth-scroll navigation across all desktop viewports. You can now explore the live design on the canvas.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a booking modal to the CTA button
Create a mobile version of this landing page
Add subtle scroll-reveal animations to the sections
